steps.t: The sparrow's nest can be found amongst the ruins in the south-west of Harloeg, far to the south of Agamaur. Radagast the Brown has charged you with r…
Radagast the Brown is at Barad Dhorn in Agamaur. You should quickly bring the sparrow back to Radagast before it gets scared and flies back to its nes…
Radagast the Brown is at Barad Dhorn. You should speak to Radagast to see what else he would have you do.
